arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللهِ
english translation text:
Assalāmu ʿalayka yā Abā ʿAbdillāhi
Peace be upon you, O Abā ʿAbdallāh,

wa ʿala-l-arwāḥ il-latī ḥallat bi-fanāʾik,
and upon those souls who alighted in your courtyard!

arabic text: عَلَيْكَ مِنِّي سَلَامُ اللهِ أَبَدًا مَا بَقِيتُ
english translation text:
ʿalayka minnī salām Ullāhi abadan mā baqītu
I ask Allāh to send peace upon you so long as I live,

wa baqī al-laylu wa-n-nahār,
And so long as night and day endure,

arabic text: وَلَا جَعَلَهُ اللهُ آخِرَ الْعَهْدِ مِنِّي لِزِيَارَتِكُمْ.
english translation text:
Wa lā jaʿalah Ullāhi ākhir al-ʿahdi minnī li-zyāratikum.
And let not this be my last visit to you.

Assalāmu ʿal al-Ḥusayn,
Peace be upon Ḥusayn,

Wa ʿalā ʿAliyy ibn il-Ḥusayn,
upon ʿAlī, the son of Ḥusayn,

Wa ʿalā awlād il-Ḥusayn,
upon the children of Ḥusayn,

Wa ʿalā aṣḥāb il-ḥusayn.
And upon the companions of Ḥusayn.
